TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Piyoxo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 228 buwan, 595 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 415 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 180 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Piyoxo hya' ga Torik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Piyoxo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč pijoxo …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ¶~ ®inkoŇč s~…ēoŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na pijoxo ńßja Ē …£a torik. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan alaŇč pijoxo …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Piyoxo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 228 buwan, 595 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 415 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 180 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Piyoxo hya' ga Torik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Piyoxo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
